summary: Closed M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 after PR #225 passed both PR Gate checks, merged, and entered origin/main at a670d4c462f941ba461869e53a758dc512d8c604.

decisions.decision: M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 is CLOSED because the accepted branch entered origin/main.
M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 is now READY and must carry the anti-grid/lattice acceptance standard into prototype content migration.
M7 content lock remains blocked until the full topology recovery chain validates and product owner reconsiders.

risks.summary: The authoritative schema is in main, but default player-facing fixture content and client rendering still need topology-backed migration.
risks.mitigation: Start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 next; do not reopen content lock or M7 exit.

requested_action: Integrate this closure checkpoint, sync main, then start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001.
